blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,124 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 1.7" of snow, highs of 32°F, gusts to 43 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 26".
